'''''UFC 295: Procházka vs. Pereira''''' was a [[mixed martial arts]] event produced by the [[Ultimate Fighting Championship]] that took place on November 11, 2023, at the [[Madison Square Garden]] in New York City.<ref name="NY">{{cite web |last=Iole |first=Kevin |date=July 7, 2023 |title=Jon Jones will make 1st heavyweight title defense at UFC 295 in New York against ex-champ Stipe Miocic |url=https://sports.yahoo.com/jon-jones-will-make-1st-heavyweight-title-defense-at-ufc-295-in-new-york-against-ex-champ-stipe-miocic-233846249.html |access-date=July 7, 2023 |website=sports.yahoo.com |archive-date=July 8, 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20230708013139/https://sports.yahoo.com/jon-jones-will-make-1st-heavyweight-title-defense-at-ufc-295-in-new-york-against-ex-champ-stipe-miocic-233846249.html |url-status=live }}</ref>

==Background==
The event marked the promotion's tenth visit to New York City and first since [[UFC 281]] in November 2022.<ref name="NY" />

A [[UFC Heavyweight Championship]] bout between champion at the time (also former two-time [[UFC Light Heavyweight Championship|UFC Light Heavyweight Champion]]) [[Jon Jones]] and former two-time champion [[Stipe Miocic]] was expected to headline the event.<ref>{{cite web |last=King |first=Nolan |date=July 7, 2023 |title=Jon Jones vs. Stipe Miocic heavyweight title fight set to headline UFC 295 in November |url=https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/2023/07/ufc-295-news-jon-jones-vs-stipe-miocic-november-nyc |access-date=July 7, 2023 |website=mmajunkie.usatoday.com |archive-date=July 9, 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20230709112339/https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/2023/07/ufc-295-news-jon-jones-vs-stipe-miocic-november-nyc |url-status=live }}</ref> However on October 25, it was announced that the bout was scrapped after Jones sustained a [[pectoral muscle]] injury that would require surgery.<ref name="Changes">{{cite web |last=King |first=Nolan |date=October 25, 2023 |title=Injured Jon Jones out of UFC 295 vs. Stipe Miocic; Sergei Pavlovich vs. Tom Aspinall interim title fight set |url=https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/2023/10/ufc-295-jon-jones-injured-out-sergei-pavlovich-vs-tom-aspinall-interim-title-fight |access-date=October 25, 2023 |website=mmajunkie.usatoday.com |archive-date=October 29, 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20231029175712/https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/2023/10/ufc-295-jon-jones-injured-out-sergei-pavlovich-vs-tom-aspinall-interim-title-fight |url-status=live }}</ref> As a result, the promotion opted to book an interim title bout between the originally scheduled backup fighter [[Sergei Pavlovich]] and [[Tom Aspinall]] in the co-main event.<ref>{{cite web |last=Martin |first=Damon |date=August 30, 2023 |title=Sergei Pavlovich expected to serve as backup for Jon Jones vs. Stipe Miocic at UFC 295 |url=https://www.mmafighting.com/2023/8/30/23852963/sergei-pavlovich-expected-to-serve-as-backup-for-jon-jones-vs-stipe-miocic-at-ufc-295 |access-date=August 30, 2023 |website=mmafighting.com |archive-date=September 20, 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20230920175759/https://www.mmafighting.com/2023/8/30/23852963/sergei-pavlovich-expected-to-serve-as-backup-for-jon-jones-vs-stipe-miocic-at-ufc-295 |url-status=live }}</ref><ref name="Changes" />

A [[UFC Light Heavyweight Championship]] bout for the vacant title between former champion [[Jiří Procházka]] (also the inaugural [[Rizin Fighting Federation#Light Heavyweight Championship|Rizin Light Heavyweight Champion]]) and former [[UFC Middleweight Championship|UFC Middleweight Champion]] [[Alex Pereira]] (also former [[Glory (kickboxing)#Glory Middleweight Championship|Glory Middleweight]] and [[Glory (kickboxing)#Glory Light Heavyweight Championship|Light Heavyweight Champion]]) was originally expected to serve as the co-headliner, but instead served as the main event after the previous one was cancelled.<ref>{{cite web |last=Martin |first=Damon |date=September 20, 2023 |title=Jiri Prochazka vs. Alex Pereira set for vacant light heavyweight title fight as UFC 295 co-main event |url=https://www.mmafighting.com/2023/9/20/23883402/jiri-prochazka-vs-alex-pereira-set-for-vacant-light-heavyweight-title-fight-as-ufc-295-co-main-event |access-date=September 21, 2023 |website=mmafighting.com |archive-date=October 3, 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20231003012313/https://www.mmafighting.com/2023/9/20/23883402/jiri-prochazka-vs-alex-pereira-set-for-vacant-light-heavyweight-title-fight-as-ufc-295-co-main-event |url-status=live }}</ref><ref name="Changes" /> Former champion [[Jamahal Hill]] vacated the title after he ruptured his [[Achilles tendon]].<ref>{{cite web |last=Martin |first=Damon |date=July 14, 2023 |title=Jamahal Hill relinquishes UFC title after suffering ruptured Achilles in basketball game |url=https://www.mmafighting.com/2023/7/14/23791259/jamahal-hill-relinquishes-ufc-light-heavyweight-title-suffering-ruptured-achilles-tendon-basketball |access-date=September 20, 2023 |website=mmafighting.com |archive-date=July 31, 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20230731212505/https://www.mmafighting.com/2023/7/14/23791259/jamahal-hill-relinquishes-ufc-light-heavyweight-title-suffering-ruptured-achilles-tendon-basketball |url-status=live }}</ref>

A flyweight bout between [[Joshua Van]] and Kevin Borjas took place at the event.<ref name="Borjas vs. Van">{{cite web |last= |date=August 14, 2023 |title=Kevin Borjas UFC debut reported vs Joshua Van at UFC 295 event |url=https://www.itnwwe.com/mma/kevin-borjas-ufc-debut-vs-joshua-van-ufc-295/ |access-date=August 15, 2023 |website=itnwwe.com |archive-date=August 15, 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20230815234408/https://www.itnwwe.com/mma/kevin-borjas-ufc-debut-vs-joshua-van-ufc-295/ |url-status=live }}</ref> The pairing was previously scheduled to meet at [[Dana White's Contender Series (season 7)#Week 1 – August 8|Dana White's Contender Series 57]], but Van was pulled in order to face [[Zhalgas Zhumagulov]] at [[UFC on ABC: Emmett vs. Topuria]].<ref>{{cite web |last=Lee |first=Alexander K. |date=June 15, 2023 |title=Zhalgas Zhumagulov vs. Felipe Bunes off UFC Vegas 75, Zhumagulov to fight Joshua Van at UFC Jacksonville |url=https://www.mmafighting.com/2023/6/15/23762652/zhalgas-zhumagulov-vs-felipe-bunes-off-ufc-vegas-75-zhumagulov-to-fight-joshua-van-ufc-jacksonville |access-date=June 15, 2023 |website=mmafighting.com |archive-date=June 16, 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20230616195704/https://www.mmafighting.com/2023/6/15/23762652/zhalgas-zhumagulov-vs-felipe-bunes-off-ufc-vegas-75-zhumagulov-to-fight-joshua-van-ufc-jacksonville |url-status=live }}</ref>

A middleweight bout between [[Derek Brunson]] and [[Roman Dolidze]] was set to take place at the event.<ref>{{cite web |last=Leonard |first=Harvey |date=July 24, 2023 |title=Derek Brunson vs. Roman Dolidze Added To UFC 295 At Madison Square Garden On November 11 |url=https://www.mmanews.com/news/derek-brunson-roman-dolidze-added-ufc-295-madison-square-garden |access-date=September 15, 2023 |website=mmanews.com |archive-date=July 24, 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20230724231920/https://www.mmanews.com/news/derek-brunson-roman-dolidze-added-ufc-295-madison-square-garden |url-status=live }}</ref> However, Brunson parted ways with the organization and the bout was scrapped.<ref>{{cite web |last=Al-Shatti |first=Shaun |date=September 14, 2023 |title=Derek Brunson and UFC part ways, fight with Roman Dolidze scrapped |url=https://www.mmafighting.com/2023/9/14/23874530/derek-brunson-parts-ways-with-ufc-fight-with-roman-dolidze-scrapped |access-date=September 15, 2023 |website=mmafighting.com |archive-date=September 20, 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20230920123822/https://www.mmafighting.com/2023/9/14/23874530/derek-brunson-parts-ways-with-ufc-fight-with-roman-dolidze-scrapped |url-status=live }}</ref>

A flyweight bout between [[Matt Schnell]] and [[Steve Erceg]] was expected to take place at the event.<ref>{{cite web |last=Critchfield |first=Tristen |date=September 6, 2023 |title=Derek Brunson vs. Roman Dolidze, Matt Schnell vs. Steve Erceg confirmed for UFC 295 |url=https://www.sherdog.com/news/news/Derek-Brunson-vs-Roman-Dolidze-Matt-Schnell-vs-Steve-Erceg-Confirmed-for-UFC-295-190958 |access-date=September 7, 2023 |website=sherdog.com |archive-date=October 8, 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20231008172527/https://www.sherdog.com/news/news/Derek-Brunson-vs-Roman-Dolidze-Matt-Schnell-vs-Steve-Erceg-Confirmed-for-UFC-295-190958 |url-status=live }}</ref> However, Schnell withdrew from the bout for unknown reasons and was replaced by Alessandro Costa.<ref name="Costa in">{{cite web |last= |date=October 28, 2023 |title=UFC 295: Matt Schnell Out, Alessandro Costa Faces Steve Erceg |url=https://www.itnwwe.com/mma/ufc-295-matt-schnell-out-alessandro-costa-faces-steve-erceg/ |access-date=October 29, 2023 |website=itnwwe.com |archive-date=October 29, 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20231029051751/https://www.itnwwe.com/mma/ufc-295-matt-schnell-out-alessandro-costa-faces-steve-erceg/ |url-status=live }}</ref>

A lightweight bout between [[Mateusz Rębecki]] and [[Nurullo Aliev]] was scheduled for the event.<ref name="Rebecki vs. Aliev">{{cite web |last= |date=September 16, 2023 |title=Mateusz Rębecki vs Nurullo Aliev set for UFC 295 in Nov |url=https://www.itnwwe.com/mma/mateusz-rebecki-v-nurullo-aliev-set-for-ufc-295/ |access-date=November 2, 2023 |website=itnwwe.com |archive-date=September 29, 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20230929182826/https://www.itnwwe.com/mma/mateusz-rebecki-v-nurullo-aliev-set-for-ufc-295/ |url-status=live }}</ref> However, Aliev withdrew from the event in early November due to injury.<ref name="Aliev out">{{cite web |last=King |first=Nolan |date=November 3, 2023 |title=Nurullo Aliev announces UFC 295 withdrawal due to injury |url=https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/2023/11/ufc-295-fight-card-nurullo-aliev-vs-mateusz-rebecki-cancellation |access-date=November 3, 2023 |website=mmajunkie.usatoday.com |archive-date=November 4, 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20231104083733/https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/2023/11/ufc-295-fight-card-nurullo-aliev-vs-mateusz-rebecki-cancellation |url-status=live }}</ref> He was replaced by returning veteran [[Roosevelt Roberts]].<ref name="roberts in">{{cite web |last=Bartłomiej Stachura |date=November 7, 2023 |title=Jest zastępstwo! Mateusz Rębecki wystąpi na sobotniej gali UFC 295 w Nowym Jorku! |trans-title=There is a replacement! Mateusz Rębecki will perform at Saturday's UFC 295 gala in New York! |url=https://www.lowking.pl/jest-zastepstwo-mateusz-rebecki-wystapi-na-sobotniej-gali-ufc-295-w-nowym-jorku/ |access-date=November 7, 2023 |website=lowking.pl |language=Polish |archive-date=November 7, 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20231107091520/https://www.lowking.pl/jest-zastepstwo-mateusz-rebecki-wystapi-na-sobotniej-gali-ufc-295-w-nowym-jorku/ |url-status=live }}</ref> At the weigh-ins, Roberts came in at 158 pounds (two pounds over the lightweight non-title bout limit). His bout with Rebecki proceeded at catchweight with Roberts forfeiting 20% of his purse.<ref name="weigh-in misses">{{cite web |last=Lee |first=Alexander K. |date=November 10, 2023 |title=UFC 295 weigh-in results: Championship fights official, 2 fighters miss weight |url=https://www.mmafighting.com/2023/11/10/23955296/ufc-295-weigh-in-results-championship-fights-official-2-fighters-miss-weight |access-date=November 10, 2023 |website=mmafighting.com |archive-date=November 10, 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20231110180033/https://www.mmafighting.com/2023/11/10/23955296/ufc-295-weigh-in-results-championship-fights-official-2-fighters-miss-weight |url-status=live }}</ref>

At the weigh-ins, [[Jamall Emmers]] came in at 147 pounds (one pound over the featherweight non-title bout limit). His bout with Dennis Buzukja proceeded at catchweight with Emmers forfeiting 20% of his purse.<ref name="weigh-in misses"/>

==Bonus awards==
The following fighters received $50,000 bonuses.<ref>{{cite web |last=Taylor |first=Chris |date=November 11, 2023 |title=UFC 295 Bonus Report: Seven fighters take home an extra $50k |url=https://www.bjpenn.com/mma-news/ufc-295/ufc-295-bonus-report-seven-fighters-take-home-an-extra-50k/ |access-date=November 11, 2023 |website=bjpenn.com |archive-date=November 12, 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20231112054907/https://www.bjpenn.com/mma-news/ufc-295/ufc-295-bonus-report-seven-fighters-take-home-an-extra-50k/ |url-status=live }}</ref>
*'''Fight of the Night: Viacheslav Borshchev vs. Nazim Sadykhov'''
*'''Performance of the Night: Alex Pereira''', '''Tom Aspinall''', '''Jéssica Andrade''', '''Benoît Saint-Denis''', and '''Diego Lopes'''
